title: allium cepa subsp. fistulosum
intro: Allium cepa subsp. fistulosum, also known as Welsh onion or Japanese bunching onion, is a type of perennial plant belonging to the Allium family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Allium cepa subsp. fistulosum include lowering cholesterol levels, reducing blood pressure, and exhibiting anticancer properties. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and bulbs can be used fresh or dried to make teas, tinctures, and infusions that are used to treat various health issues.
